rationale: The citing paper is a Journal of Marketing Research special-issue editorial that summarizes ten Mitigation in Marketing papers, and the cited paper is a mitigation-focused 2024 JMR article with managerially actionable mitigation findings, so this is likely part of the editorial’s core synthesis rather than a generic mention. The reference list shows an exact DOI match (10.1177/00222437231194950), supporting that this specific paper is intentionally included in that special-issue context.
